falsification_attempt: Checked whether the v2.2 block-verification crate lost the old constants surface. The destination still re-exports Ritual precompile addresses and keeps DEFAULT_TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY, SPC_PROOF_SIGNATURE_LENGTH, and MAX_PUBLIC_KEY_LEN at the same constants module, with additional short-async bounds layered on top.
missed_risks: A compile-only check should still verify downstream consumers import these constants from the intended crate path.
notes: The constants atom is structural rather than exact because the destination module adds v2.2 async bounds.
